title: zapoteca gracilis
intro: Zapoteca gracilis, also known as the Mexican Buckthorn or False Buckthorn, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and burns. Zapoteca gracilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
